Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Paris Olympics 2024 hub: Everything you need to know!

The 2024 Summer Olympics, officially branded as Paris 2024, will take place from 26 July to 11 August 2024 in France.

The2024 Summer Olympics, officially theGames of the XXXIII Olympiadand officially branded asParis 2024, will take place from 26 July (the date of the opening ceremony) to 11 August 2024 in France.

Some competitions will start as early as Wednesday, 24 July.

For the latest Paris Olympics 2024 news, bookmarkThe South African website’sdedicated section

This will be South Africa’sninthconsecutive appearance at the Olympics since readmission into international sport in 1991.

It will be the21stoverall appearance for South Africa, who appeared between 1904 and 1960, before being banished from the international arena due to apartheid.

South Africawill senda contingent of138athletes to this year’s Olympics who will be competing in19sporting codes.

Since readmission to the Olympic fold in 1992 in Barcelona, Team South Africa have won38Olympic medals (11 gold, 18 silver, nine bronze).

The South African websitewill keep readers up-to-date with unparalleledFREEcoverage of every South African performance and result.

Did we mention all articles will be free to read?
